name: Wait quote guide
description: Decision guide for quoted waits, timing buffers, release logic, and escalation when seating readiness and promises drift apart.
source_ref: core-v2: expectation-setting needs explicit rules rather than personality-driven guesses
usage_moment: Use whenever waits are quoted, held, widened, or reset during live service.
expected_output: A plain-language rule set for quote ranges, buffer use, and escalation thresholds.
